site.name: Pokopia Guide
site.description: Beginner's guide to Pokémon Pokopia. Pokédex, habitat creation, and furniture crafting recipes to help new trainers get started.
site.title: Pokémon Pokopia Guide | Pokédex & Wiki | PokopiaGuide.com

home.heroDescription: The most comprehensive Pokémon Pokopia game guide and data platform. Whether you're a beginner or a veteran trainer, you'll find everything you need here.

features.pokedexDesc: Browse detailed data, types, and abilities of all Pokémon

features.exploreDesc: Area guides, Pokémon encounters, movement methods
features.multiplayerDesc: Friend visits, 4-player online, game sharing features

pokedex.title: Pokédex

pokedex.dataDisclaimer: Data sourced from the main Pokémon series. Pokopia in-game data will be updated after release.

comingSoon.releaseNote: The game launches on March 5, 2026. Guide content will be available soon after release.
